# airflow_variable (Resource)

Provides an Airflow variable.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "airflow_variable" "example" {
  key   = "example"
  value = "example"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `key` (String) The variable key.
- `value` (String) The variable value.

### Optional

- `description` (String) The variable description.
- `team_name` (String) Team name for Airflow 3 multi-team deployments. Requires multi-team mode enabled and the team to exist; ignored on Airflow 2.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The variable key.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import airflow_variable.example example
```
